prompt: An explosion of colors, where royal silk meets a cascade of gemstones. Every thread whispers luxury, every sparkle tells a story.
promptEn: An explosion of colors, where royal silk meets a cascade of gemstones. Every thread whispers luxury, every sparkle tells a story.
promptZh: 色彩的爆发，皇家 丝绸 与层叠的 宝石 交相辉映。每一根丝线都低语着奢华，每一抹闪光都诉说着故事。
